full_text:
Spatially-derived fibroblast signatures onto scRNA-seq-data

Kürşat Birgin
06.10.2025

1

Data Overview & Strategy

Single-cell RNA-seq: multi-patient dataset of tumor, fibroblast, and epithelial cells

Spatial transcriptomics (ST): fibroblast signatures from separate samples

Integration approach:

Currently; patient-independent projection of ST signatures onto scRNA-seq

Later; patient-specific mapping, requires merging ST and scRNA-seq patient tables

Current Code

Load required R packages
Load scRNA-seq Seurat object (all cells, patient-independent) [from Sara]
Load spatial transcriptomics (ST) fibroblast signature gene lists (Top100, Top200) [from Nika]

Extract genes from ST data and intersect with genes present in the scRNA-seq object 
Subset scRNA-seq to Fibroblasts and Epithelial cells (focus on tumor–stroma interface) 

Note: “Epithelial cells” may include non-tumor cells; to be double-checked [Sara?]

Reduce memory by keeping only variable features + ST signature genes

Generate DotPlot showing Top100 signature genes across cell types
Dot size = fraction of cells expressing a gene; color = relative expression

Here: Top 10/100 features/genes

v

v

Note: Currently, the dataset doesn’t separate tumor vs normal epithelial cells explicitly. For now, I used all epithelial cells as a tumor proxy to visualize fibroblast–epithelial interactions at the tumor–stroma interface (TSI).

Gene(s) | Main Function / Pathway | Interpretation in Context
SFRP2 / SFRP4 | WNT pathway modulators | Classic CAF markers, enriched at tumor–stroma interface (TSI)
MMP11 | ECM remodeling enzyme | CAF-specific, supports tumor invasion at TSI
FOS | Stress-responsive transcription factor | Marks activated fibroblasts at TSI
C7 | Complement system component | Indicates immune-modulatory fibroblasts
CCL19 | Immune cell chemoattractant | Marks fibroblasts in TLS-like immune niches
FDCSP | Follicular dendritic cell–related stromal protein | Linked to TLS or immune-interacting stroma
MMP9 | ECM-degrading enzyme | Inflammation-linked, matrix-remodeling fibroblasts
CLU | Secreted chaperone, stress response | Stress/tissue-remodeling in both tumor and stroma
MGP | Matrix Gla protein (ECM deposition) | ECM‐producing, myofibroblast‐like fibroblasts enriched in stromal zones.

Here: Top 10/100 features/genes

Thank you. Open for input! ☺️
